mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_size AS productSize, p.storage_temperature AS storageTemperature, p.expiration_date AS expirationDate, cm.category_name AS categoryName, c.category_name AS subCategoryName
FROM product p JOIN business_table b ON p.business_id = b.business_id JOIN user_table u ON b.user_id = u.user_id JOIN c_mid_level c ON p.category_mid_id = c.category_mid_id JOIN category_main cm ON c.category_main_id = cm.category_id
WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY product_id DESC
